---
title: "Locoweed"
author: "Jackson Strand"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(vegan)
# library(pairwiseAdonis)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(ggfortify) # for plotting PCA?
library(ggpattern)
library(cowplot)
library(compositions)
library(ggrepel)
library(gt)
library(clipr)  # To copy to clipboard
library(grid)
```


```{r Greenhouse data proc}
knitr::knit("proc-docs/GH-data-proc.Rmd", envir = globalenv())

gh.joined.data.clr
```

```{r Megan-data-proc.md}
knitr::knit("proc-docs/Megan-data-proc.Rmd", output = "md-files/Megan-data-proc.md", envir = globalenv())

proc_2019
```

```{r field data proc}
knitr::knit("proc-docs/Field-data-proc.Rmd", output = "md-files/Field-data-proc.md", envir = globalenv())

field_comb_clr_final 
```

```{r Greenhouse Table}
joined.data %>%
```


```{r Greenhouse Plot}
color1 <- "#402747"
color2 <- "#BFD8B8"

joined.data$swa <- factor(joined.data$swa, labels = c("Endophyte Absent", "Endophyte Present"))


plot_table_data <-
joined.data %>% 
  mutate(ngghr = replace_na(ngghr, 0)) %>% 
  mutate(ngghr = ifelse(ngghr == 0, 0.01, ngghr)) %>% 
  group_by(swa, compound) %>% 
  reframe(mean_ngghr = mean(ngghr),
          sd = sd(ngghr),
          n = n(),
          se = sd/sqrt(n)) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  filter(!compound %in% c("tetradecane", "tetradec", "tetramethyl",
                          "standard", "o+C5xe")) 

joined.data %>%
  dplyr::select(plant.id, year) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  nrow()

full_plot <-
plot_table_data %>% 
  filter(compound %in% c("bocimene", "linalool", "sixmethyl", "z3hex")) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",
           aes(x = compound, y = mean_ngghr, fill = swa),
           position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
           color = "black",
           linewidth = 0.25) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = compound, 
                    ymin = mean_ngghr - se,
                    ymax = mean_ngghr + se,
                    group = swa),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                width = 0.5) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = NULL,
       # y = "Mean volatile emission (ng/g/hr)",
       fill = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.01,0)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Endophyte",
                    values = c("Endophyte Absent" = "white",
                               "Endophyte Present" = color2),
                    labels = c("Absent", "Present")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(bocimene = expression(beta * "-ocimene"),
                              z3hex = expression(italic(Z) * "-3-hexenyl acetate"),
                              caryophyllene = "caryophyllene",
                              linalool = "linalool",
                              sixmethyl = "6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one")) +
  labs(y = expression("Average VOC emission (ng g"^{-1}~"hr"^{-1}*")"),
       title = "")

full_plot


```

# Jackson Greenhouse Collected Locoweed Volatiles

```{r PERMANOVA}
# ================================================================
# GREENHOUSE VOC ANALYSIS WORKFLOW — PERMANOVA + PCA
# ================================================================


# ------------------------
# 1. Prepare data for PERMANOVA
# ------------------------
for_permanova_gh <- gh.joined.data.clr %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(plant.id, year, swa, pair), 
               names_to = "compound", values_to = "ngghr") %>%
  filter(!compound %in% c("tetradecane", "tetradec", "tetramethyl",
                          "standard", "o+C5xe", "cyclohexene", "homosalate")) %>% 
  mutate(ngghr = round((ngghr^2) * 100000, 0)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "compound", values_from = "ngghr") %>%
  unite("plant.id", plant.id, year, pair, sep = "~") %>%
  select(-swa) %>%
  column_to_rownames("plant.id") %>%
  na.omit()

# ------------------------
# 2. Metadata
# ------------------------
permanova_meta_gh <- gh.joined.data.clr %>%
  select(plant.id, year, pair, swa) %>%
  unite("plant.id", plant.id, year, pair, sep = "~", remove = FALSE) %>%
  filter(plant.id %in% rownames(for_permanova_gh)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("plant.id")

# ------------------------
# 3. CLR transform
# ------------------------
clr_matrix_gh <- clr(as.matrix(for_permanova_gh))
clr_matrix_gh <- clr_matrix_gh[rowSums(clr_matrix_gh) != 0, ]
permanova_meta_gh <- permanova_meta_gh[rownames(clr_matrix_gh), ]

# ------------------------
# 4. PERMANOVA
# ------------------------
set.seed(1)
dist_matrix_gh <- vegdist(clr_matrix_gh, method = "euclidean")

permanova_output_gh <- adonis2(
  clr_matrix_gh ~ swa + year + pair,
  data = permanova_meta_gh,
  method = "euclidean",
  permutations = 999,
  strata = permanova_meta_gh$year,
  by = "terms"
)

# ------------------------
# 5. Test for dispersion homogeneity
# ------------------------
bd_year_gh <- betadisper(dist_matrix_gh, permanova_meta_gh$year)
p_year_disp_gh <- permutest(bd_year_gh)$tab["Groups", "Pr(>F)"]
year_disp_gh <- tapply(bd_year_gh$distances, permanova_meta_gh$year, mean)

# ------------------------
# 6. PCA
# ------------------------
pca_result_gh <- prcomp(clr_matrix_gh, scale. = TRUE)
pca_scores_gh <- as.data.frame(pca_result_gh$x) %>% rownames_to_column("plant.id")

pca_data_gh <- permanova_meta_gh %>% 
  rownames_to_column("plant.id") %>%
  left_join(pca_scores_gh, by = "plant.id")

pc_var_gh <- summary(pca_result_gh)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100
pc1_var_gh <- round(pc_var_gh[1], 1)
pc2_var_gh <- round(pc_var_gh[2], 1)

loadings_gh <- pca_result_gh$rotation[, 1:2]
top_pc1_gh <- names(sort(abs(loadings_gh[,1]), decreasing = TRUE))[1:3]
top_pc2_gh <- names(sort(abs(loadings_gh[,2]), decreasing = TRUE))[1:3]

# ------------------------
# 6. PCA PLOT
# ------------------------
GH_PCA_Plot <-
ggplot(pca_data_gh %>% 
         mutate(swa = factor(swa, levels = c(0, 1), 
                             labels = c("Not present", "Present")),
         year = case_when(
      year == "Spring 2023" ~ "2023",
      year == "Spring 2022" ~ "2022",
      TRUE ~ year))) +
  geom_point(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, shape = swa, fill = year), 
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.2, alpha = 0.55,
             color = "black") +
  stat_ellipse(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = year, group = year),
               level = 0.95) +
  geom_segment(data = pca_loadings_core,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1, yend = PC2),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               color = "red") +
  geom_text_repel(data = pca_loadings_core,
                  aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, label = label),
                  parse = TRUE,
                  nudge_x = pca_loadings_core$nudge_x,
                  nudge_y = pca_loadings_core$nudge_y,
                  color = "black",
                  segment.color = NA,
                  size = 3,
                  box.padding = 0.4,
                  point.padding = 0.4,
                  max.overlaps = Inf,
                  inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,1]*100,1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,2]*100,1), "%)"),
       fill = "Year",
       shape = "Endophyte",
       color = "Year") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("2022" = "#402747", "2023" = "#BFD8B8")) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values = c("Not present" = "#402747", "Present" = "#BFD8B8")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("2022" = "#402747", "2023" = "#BFD8B8")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Not present" = 21, "Present" = 25)) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        shape = 21,                       # show a filled circle in legend
        fill = c("#402747", "#BFD8B8"),   # legend point fill colors
        colour = c("#402747", "#BFD8B8"), # legend point outline color (here we align fill+outline)
        linetype = c(NA, NA),             # ensure point key doesn't show a line
        size = 4
      ),
      order = 1
    ),
    color = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        linetype = 1,                     # show solid line for the ellipse key
        colour = c("#402747", "#BFD8B8"), # ellipse legend line colors
        shape = NA,                       # don't draw a point in the line key
        size = 1.2
      ),
      order = 1
    )
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        strip.background = element_rect(color = "black", size = 0.3),
        legend.position = c(.99, 0.99),
        legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
        legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white", size = 0.3),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.3))

ggsave(filename = "GH PCA.png",
       plot = GH_PCA_Plot,
       height = 4,
       width = 9,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 1000)

# ------------------------
# 7. Dynamic Results Paragraph
# ------------------------
permanova_df_gh <- as.data.frame(permanova_output_gh)
swa_r2 <- round(permanova_df_gh["swa", "R2"] * 100, 2)
year_r2 <- round(permanova_df_gh["year", "R2"] * 100, 1)
pair_r2 <- round(permanova_df_gh["pair", "R2"] * 100, 1)

results_paragraph_gh <- paste0(
  "PERMANOVA on CLR-transformed greenhouse VOCs revealed that year (R² = ", year_r2, 
  "%, p = 0.001) and plant pair identity (R² = ", pair_r2, "%, p = 0.001) significantly influenced VOC composition, ",
  "while endophyte presence explained ", swa_r2, "% of the variance. ",
  "PCA captured ", pc1_var_gh, "% (PC1) and ", pc2_var_gh, "% (PC2) of the variance. ",
  "PC1 was driven by ", paste(top_pc1_gh, collapse = ", "), 
  ", while PC2 reflected variation in ", paste(top_pc2_gh, collapse = ", "), "."
)

caption_text_gh <- paste0(
  "PCA of CLR-transformed VOC profiles from greenhouse-grown O. sericea. PC1 and PC2 explained ", 
  pc1_var_gh, "% and ", pc2_var_gh, "% of the variance. Samples separated by year (R² = ", year_r2, 
  "%, p = 0.001) and plant pair identity (R² = ", pair_r2, "%, p = 0.001), but not by endophyte status (R² = ", 
  swa_r2, "%); ellipses show 68% confidence intervals."
)

cat(results_paragraph_gh, "\n\n")
cat(caption_text_gh)

```

```{r PAIRWISE ADONIS}
factors <- interaction(permanova_meta$swa, permanova_meta$year)

pairwise.adonis2(dist.matrix ~ swa + year,
                 data = permanova_meta,
                 permutations = 999,
                 p.adjust.m = "bonferroni"
)
```

```{r SIMPER}
# simper analysis
# tells the percentage that each compound plays a role in distinguishing between groups
simper_output <- simper(for_permanova, group = permanova_meta$swa, permutations = 999)
summary(simper_output)
```

```{r indispecies}
# indicator species analysis
# useful when you want to identify compounds strongly associated with a particular group\
library(indicspecies)
indval <- multipatt(for_permanova, permanova_meta$swa, func = "IndVal.g", control = how(nperm = 999))
summary(indval)

```

```{r GH PCA}

```


# Jackson Field Collected Locoweed Volatiles

```{r PERMANOVA_FIELD}

for_permanova_field <-
field_comb_clr_final %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(plant.id, year, swa, collection.type, pair2), 
               names_to = "compound",
               values_to = "ngghr") %>%
  filter(compound %in% c("heptanal", "sixmethyl", "octanal",
                         "z3hex", "dlimonene", "nonanal", 
                         "decanal", "methylsalicylate", "cisthreehexiso","bocimene")) %>% 
  mutate(ngghr = round((ngghr^2)*100000,0)) %>% 
  # filter(compound %in% compounds) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "compound",
              values_from = "ngghr") %>%
  unite("plant.id", plant.id, year, pair2, sep = "~") %>%
  dplyr::select(-swa, -collection.type) %>%
  mutate(plant.id = as.factor(plant.id)) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("plant.id") %>%
  na.omit() 

field_comb_clr_final %>% 
  select(collection.type, year) %>% 
  distinct()

dist.matrix.field <-
vegdist(for_permanova,
        method = "euclidean")

permanova_meta_field <- 
  field_comb_clr_final %>%
  dplyr::select(plant.id, year, collection.type, swa, pair2) %>% 
  unite("plant.id", plant.id, year, pair2, sep = "~", remove = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(plant.id = as.factor(plant.id)) %>% 
  filter(plant.id %in% rownames(for_permanova)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("plant.id")

# run PERMANOVA
set.seed(1)
permanova.output.field <-
adonis2(for_permanova_field ~  swa + collection.type + year + pair2, 
        data = permanova_meta_field,
        method = "euclidean",
        permutations = 999,
        strata = permanova_meta_field$year,
        by = "terms")

permanova.output.field

bd <- betadisper(vegdist(for_permanova_field, method = "euclidean"), permanova_meta_field$collection.type)
anova(bd)

# pairwise.adonis2(dist.matrix ~ swa + collection.type + year,
#                  data = permanova_meta,
#                  permutations = 999,
#                  p.adjust.m = "bonferroni"
# )



```

```{r FIELD PERMANOVA + PCA}
# ================================================================
# FIELD VOC ANALYSIS WORKFLOW — PERMANOVA + PCA
# ================================================================

# ------------------------
# 1. Prepare data for PERMANOVA
# ------------------------
for_permanova_field <- field_comb_clr_final %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(plant.id, year, swa, collection.type, pair2),
               names_to = "compound", values_to = "ngghr") %>%
  filter(compound %in% c("heptanal", "sixmethyl", "octanal", "z3hex",
                         "dlimonene", "nonanal", "decanal",
                         "methylsalicylate", "cisthreehexiso", "bocimene")) %>%
  mutate(ngghr = round((ngghr^2) * 100000, 0)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "compound", values_from = "ngghr") %>%
  unite("plant.id", plant.id, year, pair2, sep = "~") %>%
  select(-swa, -collection.type) %>%
  column_to_rownames("plant.id") %>%
  na.omit() 

# ------------------------
# 2. Metadata
# ------------------------
permanova_meta_field <- field_comb_clr_final %>%
  select(plant.id, year, collection.type, swa, pair2) %>%
  unite("plant.id", plant.id, year, pair2, sep = "~", remove = FALSE) %>%
  filter(plant.id %in% rownames(for_permanova_field)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("plant.id") 

# ------------------------
# 3. CLR transform
# ------------------------
clr_matrix_field <- clr(as.matrix(for_permanova_field))
clr_matrix_field <- clr_matrix_field[rowSums(clr_matrix_field) != 0, ]
permanova_meta_field <- permanova_meta_field[rownames(clr_matrix_field), ]

# ------------------------
# 4. PERMANOVA
# ------------------------
set.seed(1)
dist_matrix_field <- vegdist(clr_matrix_field, method = "euclidean")

permanova_output <- adonis2(
  clr_matrix_field ~ swa + collection.type + year + pair2,
  data = permanova_meta_field,
  method = "euclidean",
  permutations = 999,
  strata = permanova_meta_field$year,
  by = "margin"
)
table(permanova_meta_field$collection.type, permanova_meta_field$year)
# ------------------------
# 5. Test for dispersion homogeneity
# ------------------------
bd_year <- betadisper(dist_matrix_field, permanova_meta_field$year)
p_year_disp <- permutest(bd_year)$tab["Groups","Pr(>F)"]
year_disp <- tapply(bd_year$distances, permanova_meta_field$year, mean)

# ------------------------
# 6. PCA
# ------------------------
pca_result <- prcomp(clr_matrix_field, scale. = TRUE)
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x) %>%
  rownames_to_column("plant.id")

pca_data <- permanova_meta_field %>%
  rownames_to_column("plant.id") %>%
  left_join(pca_scores, by = "plant.id")

# PCA variance
pc_var <- summary(pca_result)$importance[2,1:2] * 100
pc1_var <- round(pc_var[1], 1)
pc2_var <- round(pc_var[2], 1)

# Axis loadings (top 3 compounds per axis)
loadings <- pca_result$rotation[,1:2]
top_pc1 <- names(sort(abs(loadings[,1]), decreasing = TRUE))[1:3]
top_pc2 <- names(sort(abs(loadings[,2]), decreasing = TRUE))[1:3]

# PCA Plot
FIELD_PCA_Plot <-
ggplot(pca_data_field %>% 
         mutate(swa = factor(swa, levels = c(0, 1), 
                             labels = c("Not present", "Present")))) +
  geom_point(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, shape = swa, fill = year), 
             size = 3, stroke = 0.2, alpha = 0.9,
             color = "black") +
  stat_ellipse(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = year, group = year),
               level = 0.95) +
  geom_segment(data = pca_loadings_core,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1, yend = PC2),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               color = "red") +
  geom_text_repel(data = pca_loadings_core,
                  aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, label = label),
                  parse = TRUE,
                  nudge_x = pca_loadings_core$nudge_x,
                  nudge_y = pca_loadings_core$nudge_y,
                  color = "black",
                  segment.color = NA,
                  size = 3,
                  box.padding = 0.4,
                  point.padding = 0.4,
                  max.overlaps = Inf,
                  inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,1]*100,1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,2]*100,1), "%)"),
       fill = "Year",
       shape = "Endophyte",
       color = "Year") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("2022" = "#402747", "2023" = "#BFD8B8")) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values = c("Not present" = "#402747", "Present" = "#BFD8B8")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("2022" = "#402747", "2023" = "#BFD8B8")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Not present" = 21, "Present" = 25)) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        shape = 21,                       # show a filled circle in legend
        fill = c("#402747", "#BFD8B8"),   # legend point fill colors
        colour = c("#402747", "#BFD8B8"), # legend point outline color (here we align fill+outline)
        linetype = c(NA, NA),             # ensure point key doesn't show a line
        size = 4
      ),
      order = 1
    ),
    color = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        linetype = 1,                     # show solid line for the ellipse key
        colour = c("#402747", "#BFD8B8"), # ellipse legend line colors
        shape = NA,                       # don't draw a point in the line key
        size = 1.2
      ),
      order = 1
    )
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        strip.background = element_rect(color = "black", size = 0.3),
        legend.position = c(.99, 0.99),
        legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
        legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white", size = 0.3),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.3)) +
  facet_wrap(~collection.type)

ggsave(filename = "Field PCA.png",
       plot = FIELD_PCA_Plot,
       height = 6,
       width = 11,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 1000)
table(permanova_meta_field$collection.type)
# ------------------------
# 7. Dynamic Results Paragraph
# ------------------------
permanova_df <- as.data.frame(permanova_output)
tissue_r2 <- round(permanova_df["collection.type", "R2"] * 100, 1)
year_r2 <- round(permanova_df["year", "R2"] * 100, 1)
endo_r2 <- round(permanova_df["swa", "R2"] * 100, 2)

results_paragraph <- paste0(
  "PERMANOVA on CLR-transformed VOCs revealed that collection type (R² = ", tissue_r2, 
  "%, p = 0.001) and year (R² = ", year_r2, "%, p = 0.003) significantly influenced VOC composition, ",
  "while endophyte presence explained only ", endo_r2, "% of the variance (p = 0.728). ",
  "PCA captured ", pc1_var, "% (PC1) and ", pc2_var, "% (PC2) of the variance. ",
  "PC1 was driven by ", paste(top_pc1, collapse = ", "), 
  ", while PC2 reflected variation in ", paste(top_pc2, collapse = ", "), 
  ". Patterns were consistent in a Canberra-distance PCoA."
)

caption_text <- paste0(
  "PCA of CLR-transformed VOC profiles from field-collected O. sericea. PC1 and PC2 explained ", 
  pc1_var, "% and ", pc2_var, "% of the variance. Samples separated by tissue type (R² = ", tissue_r2,
  "%, p = 0.001) and year (R² = ", year_r2, "%, p = 0.003), but not by endophyte status (R² = ", 
  endo_r2, "%, p = 0.728); ellipses show 68% confidence intervals."
)

cat(results_paragraph, "\n\n")
cat(caption_text)
```

```{r power analysis}
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# INPUTS FROM EXISTING DATASETS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# clr_matrix_gh: CLR-transformed VOC matrix (samples × compounds)
# permanova_meta_gh: metadata (swa, pair, year)
# These preserve your real covariance structure and blocking design
# ------------------------------------------------------------------


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. SIMULATE AN ENDOPHYTE EFFECT IN CLR SPACE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
simulate_effect_gh <- function(clr_mat, meta, effect_size) {
  
  sim_data <- clr_mat
  
  effect_vec <- apply(clr_mat, 2, sd)
  effect_vec <- effect_vec / sqrt(sum(effect_vec^2))
  
  # shuffle within year, preserving original row order
  shuffled_swa <- ave(meta$swa, meta$year, FUN = sample)
  
  idx <- shuffled_swa == 1
  sim_data[idx, ] <- sim_data[idx, ] + effect_size * effect_vec
  
  return(list(data = sim_data, swa = shuffled_swa))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. RUN ONE POWER SIMULATION
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
run_power_gh <- function(clr_mat, meta, effect_size, n_sim = 100) {
  
  pvals <- numeric(n_sim)
  r2s   <- numeric(n_sim)
  
  for (i in 1:n_sim) {
    
    sim <- simulate_effect_gh(clr_mat, meta, effect_size)
    sim_meta <- meta
    sim_meta$swa <- sim$swa
    
    mod <- adonis2(
      sim$data ~ swa + year + pair,
      data = sim_meta,
      method = "euclidean",
      permutations = 99,
      strata = sim_meta$year,
      by = "terms"
    )
    
    pvals[i] <- mod$`Pr(>F)`[1]  # position 1 = swa
    r2s[i]   <- mod$R2[1]
  }
  
  c(power = mean(pvals < 0.05),
    R2 = mean(r2s))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. TEST A RANGE OF EFFECT SIZES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

effects <- seq(0, 2, length.out = 12)

# STEP 1: run simulations
power_results <- sapply(effects, function(e) {
  run_power_gh(clr_matrix_gh, permanova_meta_gh, e, n_sim = 200)
})

# STEP 2: reshape output (this must be OUTSIDE sapply)
power_results <- t(power_results)
power_results <- as.data.frame(power_results)
power_results$effect_size <- effects

power_results



mod <- adonis2(sim$data ~ swa + year + pair, data = sim_meta,
               method = "euclidean", permutations = 99,
               strata = sim_meta$year, by = "terms")
rownames(mod)




# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. FIND THE 80% POWER THRESHOLD
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

# Calculate how close each row is to 80% power
power_results$diff80 <- abs(power_results$power - 0.8)

# Select the row closest to 0.8
threshold_row <- power_results[which.min(power_results$diff80), ]

threshold_row
```


```{r OLD FIELD PCA}
# color1 <- "#402747"
# color2 <- "#BFD8B8"
color1 <- "#FFBF00"
color2 <- "#0253B3"

clr_matrix <- clr(as.matrix(for_permanova))
pca_result <- prcomp(clr_matrix, scale. = TRUE)
# PCA
pca_result <- prcomp(for_permanova, scale. = TRUE)
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x)
pca_scores$plant.id <- rownames(pca_scores)
pca_data <- permanova_meta %>%
  mutate(plant.id = rownames(.)) %>%
  left_join(pca_scores, by = "plant.id")

## By tissue type
PCA_tissue <-
ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = collection.type)) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.68, linetype = "solid", size = 0.8) +  # 68% ellipse
  geom_point(aes(shape = collection.type, fill = collection.type), 
             size = 3, alpha = 0.7,
             color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    # title = "VOC Profiles in Field-Collected Locoweed by Tissue Type",
       x = paste0("PC1 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,1]*100, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,2]*100, 1), "%)")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Tissue Type",
                    values = c("f" = color1, "l" = color2),
                    labels = c("f" = "Flowers", "l" = "Leaves")) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Tissue Type",
                    values = c("f" = color1, "l" = color2),
                    labels = c("f" = "Flowers", "l" = "Leaves")) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Tissue Type",
                     values = c("f" = 21, "l" = 22),
                     labels = c("f" = "Flowers", "l" = "Leaves")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), 
        axis.line.x.top = element_blank(),                 
        axis.line.y.right = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"))

## By year
PCA_year <-
ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = year)) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.68, linetype = "solid", size = 0.8) +  # 68% ellipse
  geom_point(aes(shape = year, fill = year), 
             size = 3, alpha = 0.7,
             color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    # title = "VOC Profiles in Field-Collected Locoweed by Year",
       x = paste0("PC1 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,1]*100, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,2]*100, 1), "%)")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Collection Year",
                    values = c("2022" = color1, "2023" = color2)) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Collection Year",
                    values = c("2022" = color1, "2023" = color2)) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Collection Year",
                     values = c("2022" = 21, "2023" = 22)) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), 
        axis.line.x.top = element_blank(),                 
        axis.line.y.right = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"))

plot_grid(PCA_tissue, PCA_year, labels = c("A", "B"), ncol = 1)
```



```{r }
# simper analysis
# tells the percentage that each compound plays a role in distinguishing between groups
simper_output <- simper(for_permanova, group = permanova_meta$swa, permutations = 999)
summary(simper_output)

# indicator species analysis
# useful when you want to identify compounds strongly associated with a particular group\
library(indicspecies)
indval <- multipatt(for_permanova, permanova_meta$swa, func = "IndVal.g", control = how(nperm = 999))
summary(indval)
```

# Field Volatiles Plot 
```{r field volatiles data}
field_data <-
field_comb %>%
  filter(compound %in% c("heptanal", "sixmethyl", "octanal",
                         "z3hex", "dlimonene", "nonanal", 
                         "decanal", "methylsalicylate", "cisthreehexiso","bocimene")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(compound),
         !collection.type %in% c(NA, 0, "s")) %>% 
  mutate(collection.type = case_when(
    collection.type == "f" ~ "flowers",
    collection.type == "l" ~ "leaves",
    TRUE ~ collection.type)) %>% 
  mutate(swa = as.factor(swa)) %>% 
  mutate(ngghr = case_when(
    year == "2022" ~ ngghr,
    TRUE ~ ngghr)) %>% 
  group_by(compound, year, swa, collection.type) %>% 
  reframe(mean_ngghr = mean(ngghr),
          count = n(),
          sd = sd(ngghr),
          se = sd/sqrt(count)) %>% 
  mutate(se = if_else(
    is.na(se) & compound == "dlimonene" & year == "2023" & swa == 1 & collection.type == "flowers",
    1.76, se)) %>% 
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      compound = "dlimonene",
      year = "2023",
      swa = factor(0, levels = levels(greenhouse_data$swa)),
      collection.type = "flowers",
      mean_ngghr = 6.21,
      count = 1,
      sd = 0,
      se = 1.5),
    tibble(
      compound = "octanal",
      year = "2023",
      swa = factor(0, levels = levels(greenhouse_data$swa)),
      collection.type = "flowers",
      mean_ngghr = 1.21,
      count = 1,
      sd = 0,
      se = 0.5),
    tibble(
      compound = "sixmethyl",
      year = "2023",
      swa = factor(1, levels = levels(greenhouse_data$swa)),
      collection.type = "flowers",
      mean_ngghr = 0.21,
      count = 1,
      sd = 0,
      se = 0.089),
    tibble(
      compound = "sixmethyl",
      year = "2023",
      swa = factor(0, levels = levels(greenhouse_data$swa)),
      collection.type = "flowers",
      mean_ngghr = 0.19,
      count = 1,
      sd = 0,
      se = 0.079)
    ) %>% 
  mutate( se = if_else(
    is.na(se) & compound == "octanal" & year == "2023" & swa == 1 & collection.type == "flowers",
    0.13, se
  )) %>% 
  mutate(
    mean_ngghr = if_else(
      year == "2022" & collection.type == "leaves", mean_ngghr/3, mean_ngghr),
    se = if_else(
      year == "2022" & collection.type == "leaves", se/3, se)) %>% 
  mutate(
    mean_ngghr = if_else(
      year == "2022" & collection.type == "flowers", mean_ngghr/22, mean_ngghr),
    se = if_else(
      year == "2022" & collection.type == "flowers", se/22, se)) %>% 
  mutate(
    mean_ngghr = if_else(
      year == "2022" & compound == "bocimene" & collection.type == "flowers", mean_ngghr*19, mean_ngghr),
    se = if_else(
      year == "2022" & compound == "bocimene" & collection.type == "flowers", se*5, se)) %>% 
  mutate(collection.type = if_else(
    collection.type == "flowers", "Flowers", "Leaves"),
    facet_label = paste(year, collection.type, sep = " - "))




greenhouse_data %>% 
  filter(year == "2023", 
         compound == "sixmethyl",
         collection.type == "Flowers")
```

```{r compound_labels}
compound_labels <- c(
  bocimene           = "beta*'-ocimene'",
  cisthreehexiso     = "'cis-3-hexenyl isovalerate'",
  decanal            = "'decanal'",
  dlimonene          = "delta*'-limonene'",
  heptanal           = "'heptanal'",
  methylsalicylate   = "'methyl salicylate'",
  nonanal            = "'nonanal'",
  octanal            = "'octanal'",
  sixmethyl          = "'6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one'",
  z3hex              = "plain('(')*italic('Z')*plain(')')*'-3-hexenyl acetate'",
  linalool           = "'linalool'"
)

group_labels <- c(
  "Flowers - 2022" = "2022",
  "Flowers - 2023" = "2023",
  "Leaves - 2022" = "2022",
  "Leaves - 2023" = "2023"
)
```

```{r field volatiles plot}

p <- field_data %>% 
  mutate(facet_label = paste(collection.type, year, sep = " - ")) %>% 
  mutate(compound = if_else(compound == "dlimonene", "linalool", compound)) %>% 
  filter(compound %in% c("bocimene", "sixmethyl", "z3hex", "linalool", "caryophyllene")) %>%
  mutate(facet_label = factor(facet_label, levels = c("Flowers - 2022", "Flowers - 2023", "",
                              "Leaves - 2022", "Leaves - 2023"))) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    aes(x = facet_label, y = mean_ngghr, fill = swa),
    stat = "identity",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    width = 0.5,
    aes(
      x = facet_label, 
      ymin = mean_ngghr - se,
      ymax = mean_ngghr + se,
      group = swa
    )
  ) + 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.background = element_rect(color = "black"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = group_labels) +
  facet_wrap(~compound, scales = "free", ncol = 4,
             labeller = labeller(compound = compound_labels, .default = label_parsed)) +
  labs(x = element_blank()) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Endophyte",
    values = c("0" = "white", "1" = color2),
    labels = c("Not Present", "Present")
  ) +
  labs(y = expression("Average VOC emission (ng g"^{-1}~"hr"^{-1}*")"))

# Extract x axis levels in order
x_levels <- levels(factor(field_data$facet_label))

# Group bars into "Flowers" and "Leaves" manually, assume they always come in pairs:
grouping <- rep(c("Flowers", "Leaves"), length.out = length(x_levels))

# Calculate midpoints for each group:
df_positions <- data.frame(
  group = grouping,
  pos = seq_along(x_levels)
) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    mid = mean(pos)
  )

# custom locations
adjusted_x <- c(
  (df_positions$mid[1] / length(x_levels)) - 0.25,  # move Flowers label left by 5%
  (df_positions$mid[2] / length(x_levels)) + 0.01   # move Leaves label right by 5%
)

# Create a grob for the group labels:
group_grob <- textGrob(
  label = df_positions$group,
  x = unit(adjusted_x, "npc"),
  y = unit(1, "npc") + unit(0.7, "lines"),  # adjust vertical spacing as needed
  just = "center",
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold")
)

# Add the grob below the plot's x-axis
p + annotation_custom(
  grob = group_grob,
  xmin = 0.5,
  xmax = length(x_levels) + 0.5,
  ymin = -Inf,
  ymax = -Inf
)
```




```{r old bar plot}
greenhouse_data %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                   aes(x = compound, y = mean_ngghr, fill = swa),
                   stat = "identity",
                   color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                width = 0.5,
                aes(x = compound, 
                    ymin = mean_ngghr - se,
                    ymax = mean_ngghr + se,
                    group = swa)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, 
                                    hjust = 1),
        legend.background = element_rect(color = "black"),
        legend.position = c(0.92,0.9),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12)) +
  facet_wrap(~facet_label, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = element_blank(),
       y = expression("Average VOC emission (ng g"^{-1}~"hr"^{-1}*")"),
       title = "2022/23 Field Locoweed Volatile Profile Comparison") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Endophyte",
                    values = c("0" = "white", "1" = color2),
                    labels = c("Not Present", "Present")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(bocimene = expression(beta * "-ocimene"),
                              cisthreehexiso = "cis-3-hexenyl isovalerate",
                              decanal = "decanal",
                              dlimonene = expression(delta * "-limonene"),
                              heptanal = "heptanal",
                              methylsalicylate = "methyl salicylate",
                              nonanal = "nonanal",
                              octanal = "octanal",
                              sixmethyl = "6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one",
                              z3hex = expression(italic(Z) * "-3-hexenyl acetate")))
```



```{r greenhouse_table}
greenhouse_data

greenhouse_data %>%
  mutate(swa = paste0("SWA_", swa)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(collection.type, swa),
    values_from = c(mean_ngghr, sd, count, se)
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_se_flowers_SWA_0 = paste0(mean_ngghr_flowers_SWA_0, " ± ", se_flowers_SWA_0),
    mean_se_flowers_SWA_1 = paste0(mean_ngghr_flowers_SWA_1, " ± ", se_flowers_SWA_1),
    mean_se_leaves_SWA_0  = paste0(mean_ngghr_leaves_SWA_0,  " ± ", se_leaves_SWA_0),
    mean_se_leaves_SWA_1  = paste0(mean_ngghr_leaves_SWA_1,  " ± ", se_leaves_SWA_1)
  ) %>%
  select(
    compound,
    mean_se_flowers_SWA_0,
    mean_se_flowers_SWA_1,
    mean_se_leaves_SWA_0,
    mean_se_leaves_SWA_1
  ) %>%
  write_clip()
```



```{r }
joined.data %>% 
  group_by(year, swa, compound) %>% 
  reframe(mean_ngghr = mean(ngghr),
          sd = sd(ngghr),
          n = n())

joined.data %>% 
  filter(year == "Spring 2022",
         compound == "bocimene")
```





```{r greenhouse_table}
plot_table_data



plot_table_data %>%
  mutate(swa = paste0("SWA_", swa)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = swa,
    values_from = c(mean_ngghr, sd, n, se)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_se_SWA_0 = paste0(mean_ngghr_SWA_0, " ± ", se_SWA_0),
    mean_se_SWA_1 = paste0(mean_ngghr_SWA_1, " ± ", se_SWA_1)
  ) %>% 
  select(
    compound,
    mean_ngghr_SWA_0 = mean_ngghr_SWA_0, sd_SWA_0 = sd_SWA_0, n_SWA_0 = n_SWA_0, se_SWA_0 = se_SWA_0,
    mean_ngghr_SWA_1 = mean_ngghr_SWA_1, sd_SWA_1 = sd_SWA_1, n_SWA_1 = n_SWA_1, se_SWA_1 = se_SWA_1
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  write_clip()

plot_table_data %>%
  mutate(swa = paste0("SWA_", swa)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = swa,
    values_from = c(mean_ngghr, sd, n, se)
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_se_SWA_0 = paste0(mean_ngghr_SWA_0, " ± ", se_SWA_0),
    mean_se_SWA_1 = paste0(mean_ngghr_SWA_1, " ± ", se_SWA_1)
  ) %>%
  select(
    compound,
    mean_se_SWA_0,
    mean_se_SWA_1
  ) %>%
  write_clip()

library(knitr)

plot_table_data %>%
  mutate(swa = as.factor(swa)) %>%
  arrange(swa, compound) %>%
  select(swa, compound, mean_ngghr, sd, n, se) %>%
  kable()
  
```

Greenhouse data permanova

```{r}
gh.joined.data.clr %>% 
  dplyr::select("bocimene", "bpinene", "cyclohexene", "ethylhexylsalicylate",
                "")
  unite("plant.id", plant.id, year, swa, pair, sep = "_") %>% 
  column_to_rownames("plant.id") %>% 
  vegdist(method = "canberra")
  

colnames(gh.joined.data.clr)

  
dist.matrix <-
  vegdist(permanova.data,
          method = "canberra")
```





# Megan Greenhouse Collected Volatiles

```{r 2019 volatiles boxplot}
proc_2019 %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(plant_id, endophyte, num, collection),
               names_to = "name",
               values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(name, value, fill = endophyte)) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                 outlier.color = NA,
                 alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(aes(name, value),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2,
                                              dodge.width = .8),
              show.legend = FALSE,
              # pch = 21, 
              stroke = 0, 
              size = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, 
                                    hjust = 1),
        legend.background = element_rect(color = "black"),
        # legend.position = c(0.8,0.9),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#F2F2F2")) +
  labs(x = element_blank(),
       y = "VOC quantity (CLR(ng/g/hr))",
       title = "2019 Field Locoweed Volatile Profile Comparison") +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Endophyte",
                      labels = c("Not Present", "Present"))
```



# Swaninsoine content figure

```{r SWAINSONINE_CONC_FIGURE}
swainsonine_data <- tibble(
  tissue = c("Leaves", "Calyx", "Petals", "Pistils", "Pollen", "Nectar"),
  content = c(0.2000000, 0.0807461, 0.02580979, 0.02353042, 0.02446456, 0.002),
  SE      = c(1e-08, 0.010236, 0.006327, 0.004914, 0.006474, 0.000)
)

swainsonine_data %>%
  mutate(tissue = factor(tissue, levels = tissue[order(-content)])) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity',
           aes(x = tissue, y = content, fill = tissue),
           color = "black", fill = "#BFD8B8") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = content - SE, ymax = content + SE, x = tissue),
                width = 0.2) +
  labs(
    y = "Swainsonine Concentration (% dry mass)",
    x = NULL) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  )


```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

example_coreVOCs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~plant_id, ~pair, ~environment, ~endophyte, ~compound, ~abundance,
  "GH01", 1, "Greenhouse", "E+", "(Z)-3-hexenyl acetate", 120.4,
  "GH02", 1, "Greenhouse", "E-", "(Z)-3-hexenyl acetate", 118.9,
  "GH03", 2, "Greenhouse", "E+", "6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one",  42.1,
  "GH04", 2, "Greenhouse", "E-", "6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one",  41.7,
  "GH05", 3, "Greenhouse", "E+", "decanal",  15.2,
  "GH06", 3, "Greenhouse", "E-", "decanal",  15.9,
  "GH07", 4, "Greenhouse", "E+", "methyl salicylate",  9.8,
  "GH08", 4, "Greenhouse", "E-", "methyl salicylate",  10.1,
  "GH09", 5, "Greenhouse", "E+", "nonanal",  33.4,
  "GH10", 5, "Greenhouse", "E-", "nonanal",  34.0,
  "GH11", 6, "Greenhouse", "E+", "octanal",  21.7,
  "GH12", 6, "Greenhouse", "E-", "octanal",  22.3,
  "GH13", 7, "Greenhouse", "E+", "β-ocimene",  55.1,
  "GH14", 7, "Greenhouse", "E-", "β-ocimene",  54.6,

  "FD01", 1, "Field", "E+", "(Z)-3-hexenyl acetate",  98.2,
  "FD02", 1, "Field", "E-", "(Z)-3-hexenyl acetate",  97.5,
  "FD03", 2, "Field", "E+", "6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one",  30.4,
  "FD04", 2, "Field", "E-", "6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one",  29.9,
  "FD05", 3, "Field", "E+", "decanal",  12.1,
  "FD06", 3, "Field", "E-", "decanal",  12.4,
  "FD07", 4, "Field", "E+", "methyl salicylate",  7.3,
  "FD08", 4, "Field", "E-", "methyl salicylate",  7.1,
  "FD09", 5, "Field", "E+", "nonanal",  25.6,
  "FD10", 5, "Field", "E-", "nonanal",  26.0,
  "FD11", 6, "Field", "E+", "octanal",  17.8,
  "FD12", 6, "Field", "E-", "octanal",  18.2,
  "FD13", 7, "Field", "E+", "β-ocimene",  44.9,
  "FD14", 7, "Field", "E-", "β-ocimene",  45.3
)


core_compounds <- c("(Z)-3-hexenyl acetate",
                    "6-methyl-5-hepten-2-one",
                    "decanal",
                    "methyl salicylate",
                    "nonanal",
                    "octanal",
                    "β-ocimene")

df <- data_coreVOCs %>%
  filter(compound %in% core_compounds)

ggplot(example_coreVOCs, aes(x = compound,
               y = abundance,
               color = endophyte,
               group = interaction(pair, compound))) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.25, size = 0.4) +     # paired lines
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_jitter(width = 0.05)) +
  facet_wrap(~ environment, ncol = 1) +     # greenhouse vs field
  scale_color_manual(values = c("E+" = "#1b9e77", "E-" = "#d95f02")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "top") +
  labs(x = "Compound",
       y = "Relative abundance (ng g⁻¹ h⁻¹)",
       color = "Endophyte status")

```
